paths.title: Complete Security Foundations
paths.description: All 16 lessons in module order. Full course coverage from protocol analysis to layered authentication defence.

paths.title: CTF Fast Track
paths.description: Focus on offensive techniques, exploitation patterns, and detection bypass. Skips defensive-only lessons and certificate validation deep-dives. ~10 lessons.

paths.title: Defensive Operations Focus
paths.description: Prioritises detection, telemetry, and response. Covers all defensive lessons in sequence with offensive context first.

paths.title: Cryptography and PKI Track
paths.description: Complete cryptographic foundations: CBC attacks, AEAD, forward secrecy, KDFs, PKI chain validation.
